scripts.build: esbuild scripts/codex-peer-mcp.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --minify-whitespace --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/codex-peer-mcp.mjs && node scripts/normalize-bundle.mjs
